RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Michael Ay to Perpetuate Testimony of Charles Ay by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 2035.010. Petitioner filed proofs of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. The Court did not consider the opposition by Lamons Gasket Company as it was untimely filed. (Code Civ. Proc. Section 1005(b).) All parties must file a Notice of Special Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. The deposition is to take place by Zoom technology within 30 days of this order unless the parties agree otherwise. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok.
